DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Sep-28-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brian F. Crossman (415-544-4690) for Respondent CCSF.
Mike Fox (510-548-8081) for Intervenors.
G. Ryan Patrick (415-552-8230) for Petitioner 2856-62 Washington Street
James Kraus (415-956-8100) for Real Party Divisadero HOA.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. Hearing is held. Argued re: stay and declaratory relief. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEPARTMENT OF BUILDING INSPECTION'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION is Sustained without leave to amend. The petition on it's face fails to state any grounds for relief. Petitioner filed a non-opposition. Intervenor's late-filed opposition fails to address the insufficiency of allegations in the petition. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
G. Ryan Patrick, Esq.(415-552-8230) for Plaintiff/Petitioner/Moving party 2856-62 WASHINGTON STREET HOME OWNERS' ASSOCIATION, DANIEL MULDERRY, GAYLEN MULDERRY, PETER DUBOIS, LESLIE ZIMMERMAN, HENRIETTA HAGOPIAN.
James Kraus, Esq. (415-856-8100) for Defendant/opposing party DIVISADERO PLACE HOME OWNERS' ASSOCIATION, KATE KARDOS, STEVEN POLEVOI, MERCEDES MILLER, NICOLE MELET, STONE MELET.
Mark Byrne, Esq. (510-548-8081) for Defendant/opposing party Denis Harper.

The Court inquires re: Counsels' position on the tentative rulings. Petitioner seeks clarification, Counsel for Defendant Divisadero et al. submits, Counsel for Defendant Harper opposes Tentative ruling and seeks clarification, notice was adequate. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER 2856-62 WASHINGTON STREET HOME OWNERS' ASSOCIATION, DANIEL MULDERRY, GAYLEN MULDERRY, PETER DUBOIS, LESLIE ZIMMERMAN, HENRIETTA HAGOPIAN DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION is sustained with 40 day leave to amend. Intervenor shall allege (1) that a compliant Request for Resolution has been served; Ex. H does not satisfy the requirements of CC 5935 and Intervenor fails to cite any authority for the proposition that a compilation of communications sent at different times constitutes "a Request for Resolution" per CC 5935; or (2) to serve a compliant Request for Resolution. Order is signed in open court.(see scanned order for details)Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
